description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone slip-on shoes. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this suede shoe that has a stylish midfoot band. Upper Suede upper in a slip-on style for easy use, style and breathable comfort Leather inner lining for sweat-free comfort Stylish knotted design in suede and bead detail across the midfoot woven through metal eyelets for style Patent leather stitched over the collar till the midfoot Stitch detailing on the fore foot for durability Midsole Leather footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot and textured grooves on the slightly raised heel Slightly elevated heel for better posture and height Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
